requiredContext.sql: SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, oi.id as itemId, oi.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, oi.quantity, oi.price FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}
requiredContext.templateSql:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo,
               oi.id as itemId, oi.product_id as productId,
               p.name as productName, oi.quantity, oi.price
        FROM users u
        INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
        INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
        WHERE u.id = #{userId}

issues.message: SELECT without LIMIT may return large result set
